mapper.select: SELECT ROOM_ID ,ROOM_NAME ,USE_YN ,LOCATION ,CAPACITY ,DEL_YN ,DEL_DT FROM MEETING_ROOM WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS RNUM, R.* FROM ( SELECT ROOM_ID ,ROOM_NAME ,USE_YN ,LOCATION ,CAPACITY FROM MEETING_ROOM WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY ROOM_ID )R
